articles.title: England vs. Ghana score: Three Lions held goalless in second World Cup game as Africans earn surprise draw - CBS Sports
articles.description: The Three Lions had their chances late, but the finishing was off and they had to settle for just a point
articles.content:
England were forced to settle for a share of the points at the top of Group L as an exceptional defensive display from Ghana earned themselves an impressive 0-0 draw in Foxborough, Mass.
